prestazioni: AMG M177 4.0L V8 Biturbo (M177 DE 40 AL) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ Hybrid Turbo System featuring Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, billet compressor wheels, and 1.05 A/R turbine housings, paired with a Weistec 4.0L V8 high-flow fuel system including 1,200cc injectors, dual Bosch CP4.2 pumps, and a Weistec port injection kit for E85 compatibility, targeting 850+ WHP on 93 octane and 1,000+ WHP on E85 with supporting Weistec ECU calibration and transmission tuning for the AMG SPEEDSHIFT MCT 9G

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and low-speed compression), custom-valved for the E63 W213 chassis, paired with H&R Monoball front subframe bushings and solid rear subframe mounts to eliminate flex under hard launches, complemented by a Weistec Engineering front sway bar delete and adjustable rear sway bar (22mm) for optimized weight transfer and rotation

OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way) with 45% preload and carbon fiber clutch plates, installed in the AMG rear differential housing, paired with a Weistec Engineering carbon fiber driveshaft and upgraded half-shafts with CV joints rated for 1,200 Nm of torque, ensuring drivetrain reliability under extreme boost conditions
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for W213 Estate, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with integrated canards, rear quarter panels with aggressive flares, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for the Weistec quad-tip titanium exhaust system, all finished in a custom matte Porsche GT3 RS Lime Gold wrap with gloss black accents

OEM+ AMG Night Package II front grille with custom carbon fiber mesh inserts, paired with a Vorsteiner V-FF107 carbon fiber front lip spoiler and a custom 3D-printed rear wing extension (20mm taller than OEM) for the W213 wagon, mounted on Ohlins adjustable height pillowball mounts for optimal rear downforce at high speeds

BBS FI-R 20x9.5 ET25 (front) and 20x11 ET45 (rear) forged wheels in a custom brushed titanium finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 305/25 R20 rear), paired with AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 400mm two-piece floating rotors and custom titanium pistons for reduced unsprung weight
